title: Meeting copilot output envelope (SSOT)
description: The single source of truth for what the meeting copilot emits each beat. The worker VALIDATES its parsed output against this (invalid → deterministic fallback), and persists THIS exact shape as the durable render source so live (redis) and finished (file) render identically. The renderer (views/meeting.tsx + agents/meeting-ui.md) consumes these fields. TODO(later): reconcile the renderer's documented `entities{subtitle,value}` hook to this `cards` shape (or vice-versa) and add a model-side validate-and-retry; today validation falls back rather than retries.

notes.description: Cleaned, attributed transcript lines (1:1 with input segments).

chapter.description: empty unless the source gives a literal section title

text.description: clean one-line note (first person / direct fact)

cards.description: Tagged entities/signals surfaced from the lines (kinds governed by agents/meeting.md card_kinds).
